name: Facebook Messenger Platform
description: Send and manage messages on Facebook Messenger at scale. Create automated conversations, send rich media attachments, configure bot settings, and handle bot-to-human handoffs via the Handover Protocol.

capabilities.name: messages_send
capabilities.description: Send a text message to a user on Messenger.

capabilities.name: messages_send_attachment
capabilities.description: Send an image, video, audio, or file attachment to a Messenger user.

capabilities.name: messages_send_template
capabilities.description: Send structured message templates for rich interactive experiences.

capabilities.name: messages_send_quick_replies
capabilities.description: Send a message with quick reply buttons for predefined responses.

capabilities.name: sender_actions_set
capabilities.description: Send typing indicators or mark messages as read.

capabilities.name: attachment_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a reusable attachment for later use in messages.

capabilities.name: user_profile_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a Messenger user's profile information.

capabilities.name: messenger_profile_set_get_started
capabilities.description: Configure the Get Started button for new users.

capabilities.name: messenger_profile_set_persistent_menu
capabilities.description: Configure a persistent navigation menu at the bottom of conversations.

capabilities.name: messenger_profile_set_greeting
capabilities.description: Set a greeting text on the welcome screen.

capabilities.name: messenger_profile_set_whitelisted_domains
capabilities.description: Set whitelisted domains for Messenger Extensions and webviews.

capabilities.name: handover_pass_thread_control
capabilities.description: Pass conversation control to another app for bot-to-human handoff.

capabilities.name: handover_take_thread_control
capabilities.description: Take thread control from another app as the primary receiver.

capabilities.name: handover_request_thread_control
capabilities.description: Request thread control from the primary receiver app.
